creator: Alexander Terp
description: now()/parse_epoch()/parse_date() time maps give year through second but no day-of-week, forcing scripts to hand-roll mod-7 arithmetic from a reference Monday. Add a weekday field (confirmed absent in core/rad_time.go). From field notes in #139 - author ranked the time/date gaps as the top ask.
title: Time maps: add day-of-week field
